title: Tag Fixes
description: Adds tag for items and blocks missing them in various mods to improve compatibility.
body:
**Requires [LMFT](https://modrinth.com/mod/lmft) as a dependency to load tags without all supported mods being installed.**

## Tag Fixes

Tag Fixes currently adds 46 tags to items, blocks and fluids that are missing, incomplete or broken in their respective mod to improve compatibility between mods. Primarily modpack utility, especially ore/material unification.

## Tag Localization

**From v1.0.5 onward, Tag Fixes is decoupled from Tag Localization Fixes.** If you want tag localizations or only localizations without added tags, download [Tag Localization Fixes](https://modrinth.com/mod/tag-localizations).

Tag Localization Fixes also adds localization to over 2773 tags from 63 different mods missing them, which can appear in recipes. For instance, a tag appearing unlocalized in recipes as "#farmersdelight:tools/knives" instead of localized as "Knives", as it is with Tag Localizations.

![With and Without](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea25f639778bc99650fcc3f6f48a53f390b9218a.png)

**Adds tags or tag localizations for the following mods:**

- AdvancedAE
- Alloy Smelters
- Applied Energistics 2
- Applied Mekanistics
- Amendments
- Ars Nouveau
- Ars Elemental
- Ars Technica

- Blood Magic
- Bookshelf

- Botany Pots

- Create Big Cannons
- Create: Dreams & Desires
- Create Deco
- Create Enchantment Industries
- Cofh Core
- Common (C)
- Copycats
- Comforts
- Celestisynth
- Curios
- Donum Ornamentum

- Elementalcraft
- ElytraSlot
- Forge
- Farmers' Delight

- Industrial Foregoing

- Irons' Spells and Spellbooks

- Minecraft (Vanilla)
- Minecolonies
- Minecolonies Tweaks
- Mekanism Tools

- PSI
- ProjectE

- True Ending
- Useful Backpacks

## Mod Development

Tag Fixes is still in development. More localizations and better written localizations will be added in the future.

ReversTeam Discord Server

Feel free to be used in any modpack.
